# 2026-04-04 — Saturday

Rain since 5. Stayed in.

Rolled back the mlx change. The perf gain wasn't worth the flakiness.

Pushed the fix. Ran the sidecar twice to be sure.

Priya pushed the lora bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Refactored numpy. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Made pasta. Ate pasta. Read. Slept.

Walked to Belém after lunch. Got a coffee at Hello Kristof. Thought about nothing.

Watched the light on the Tejo from the office window. Forgot to work for ten minutes.

Most of my bad code is written while trying to prove I was right earlier.
